brass_pan.description: An antique-style brass cooking pan featuring a long, polished wooden handle and realistic hammered metal textures. Ideal for rustic kitchen scenes, traditional cooking setups, or vintage decorative displays.

brass_pot_02.description: A traditional brass cooking pot featuring two integrated side handles and a realistic hammered metal surface finish. Perfect for rustic kitchens, classic culinary setups, or vintage background styling.

chandelier_lamp_01.description: An elegant, classic European-style 6-arm chandelier lamp featuring white fabric shades with gold metallic trim and hanging crystal bead accents. Perfect for luxurious living rooms, grand dining areas, or hotel lobbies.

dartboard.description: A classic, worn-out dartboard wall decoration featuring realistic scratches and grunge textures. Ideal for game rooms, bars, entertainment spaces, or vintage casual interiors.

fancy_picture_frame.description: An antique oil painting depicting a classic European landscape, enclosed in an elegantly carved wooden frame with ornate beaded detailing. Ideal for vintage living rooms, classic studies, museums, or luxury traditional interiors.

ornate_mirror.description: An elegant arched wall mirror featuring a classic ornate golden frame with sophisticated crown carvings. The glass includes realistic aged textures and subtle smudges, perfect for vintage dressing rooms, luxury bathrooms, or classic hallways.

sofa_01.description: An elegant antique-style 3-seater sofa featuring a dark, gracefully curved wooden frame and cabriole legs, upholstered in premium light gray fabric. Perfect for classic living rooms, vintage lounges, or luxurious traditional interiors.

steel_frame_shelves.description: A large industrial-style shelving unit featuring staggered wooden display shelves and a bottom 3-drawer storage cabinet, supported by a black powder-coated metal frame. Perfect for modern living rooms, home offices, or studio apartments.

wooden_picnic_table.description: A classic wooden picnic table with integrated bench seating on both sides, featuring realistic wood grain textures and weathered detailing. Ideal for outdoor parks, backyards, rustic gardens, or casual dining areas.

potted_plant_04.description: A realistic potted zebra succulent (Haworthia) plant featuring distinctive white-striped leaves, set in a white ceramic pot with decorative small pebbles on the soil surface. Ideal for modern desks, windowsills, offices, or interior staging.
